Featured Projects

AI/ML systems, GPU computing, and full-stack applications — each with a detailed write-up.

ML / AI
1000+

Documents Indexed

Spring AI RAG Knowledge Assistant

Enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation system built with Java and Spring AI, enabling intelligent document Q&A over PDF, DOCX, and Markdown files using local LLMs.

JavaSpring BootSpring AIOllama
Research
Actor-Critic

Policy Gradient RL

RL Game Agent — TripleA Strategic AI

Reinforcement learning agent for the TripleA turn-based strategy game using actor-critic policy gradient methods, OpenCV-based state extraction, and a Flask REST API for human-AI interaction.

PythonPyTorchOpenCVFlask
Research
0.92

DINOv2 Similarity

DINO World Model — Zero-Shot Visual Planning

Planner-to-Policy system leveraging DINOv2/v3 visual features for zero-shot model predictive control, combining MPC, CEM, and Diffusion Policy for segment-level planning without task-specific training.

PythonDINOv3DINOv2MPC

Experience Timeline

Software Engineering Intern

Jun 2024 — Aug 2024

AI Technology Company · China

Designed and implemented RAG pipeline integrating LLM capabilities with Java + Spring Boot backend, enabling intelligent document Q&A for internal knowledge base

Built AIGC content generation API serving multi-modal outputs, integrated with external AI service providers

Containerized microservices using Docker and established automated CI/CD pipelines via GitLab CI, reducing deployment time significantly

Leveraged Spring AI framework to abstract model inference, enabling seamless swapping between different LLM providers

Backend Developer Intern

Jun 2023 — Aug 2023

Technology Company · China

Maintained and optimized Ubuntu-based server infrastructure with Apache configuration for high-availability web services

Built full-stack web applications using JavaScript/PHP with MySQL backend, supporting both PC and mobile platforms

Implemented NAT Traversal solution enabling peer-to-peer connectivity across network boundaries for distributed systems

Developed control software for AGV (Automated Guided Vehicle) robotics platform, integrating real-time sensor data processing
